issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing embeddings or dimension mismatches.
The skill assumes a Node.js environment and does not provide guidance for other languages or AI agents.

scenarios.name: Add vector column with HNSW index and cosine search
scenarios.rationale: Baseline knows CREATE EXTENSION vector and vector(1536) but tends to be vague on HNSW parameters (m, ef_construction) and the <=> operator; treatment specifies all four rubric points verbatim from the skill.

scenarios.name: RAG pipeline with text-embedding-3-small
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for an external vector DB or numpy and frequently omits the ::vector cast / JSON.stringify pattern; treatment uses the documented openai.embeddings.create + parameterized insert + cosine retrieval chain.
